steps.title: Attach the example list
steps.content: The sentence already has its main verb: Bell "patented" many inventions. The blank should introduce examples of those inventions without creating another main verb.

steps.title: Reject extra main verbs
steps.content: A, B, and D are finite verbs, so each would create an ungrammatical second predicate after "he patented many inventions." A participial phrase can introduce the list of examples smoothly. The answer is C.
